DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS CONTINUED FROM APR-01-2009 TO APR-03-2009, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 612 (EAH NOT AVAILABLE)

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF OLGA MORALES' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compl Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Olga Morales' Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compl Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-27-2009 Continued To Apr-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 612

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Olga Morales' Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
